# Test basic mcpdiff functionality
# mcpdiff should be available in PATH from tool installation

# Test help output
exec mcpdiff -h
stderr 'Usage.*mcpdiff'

# Test with no arguments
! exec mcpdiff
stderr 'Usage.*mcpdiff'

# Test diffing two files
! exec mcpdiff test1.mcp test2.mcp
stdout 'capabilities'

# Test with identical files
exec mcpdiff test1.mcp test1.mcp
stdout 'Files match exactly!'

-- test1.mcp --
# mcptrace:v1
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}} # 100.000
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}}} # 100.100

-- test2.mcp --
# mcptrace:v1
mcp-recv {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05"}} # 100.000
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"tools":{}}}} # 100.100
